---

alias: northstar_backfill_beta
issued_on: 2025-12-01
total_eur: 770
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 480
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar workflow review invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0002                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_beta       |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-01                    |
| total_eur      | 770                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 2   | 240      | 480      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 770      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A slightly later invoice where the prototype review started taking more of the effort mix.

function.message: Completed. I worked the oldest inbox message (`00_inbox/000_next-task.md`) by running the four requested finance docs through the OCR/frontmatter workflow: added YAML frontmatter (schema-compliant invoice/bill fields and line items) while preserving each original note body, then removed the processed inbox file.

function.outcome_justification: Evidence from the four target finance files showed all required visible fields and line items needed by `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`; updates were applied in place per `migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md` and `ocr-records.md`. The inbox task in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` was fully satisfied and then removed per `process-next-inbox-item.md`, `inbox-processing-v2-update.md`, and `00_inbox/AGENTS.MD`.
